Uses of Class
org.jfree.chart.annotations.XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation

  • Packages that use XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation 
    Package Description
    org.jfree.chart.annotations
    A framework for adding annotations to charts.
    org.jfree.chart.plot
    Plot classes and related interfaces.

    • Uses of XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation in org.jfree.chart.annotations

      Methods in org.jfree.chart.annotations that return XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation XYMeasurementAnnotation.getOrientation()
      Returns how this annotation is drawn.
      static XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation[] XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in org.jfree.chart.annotations with parameters of type XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void XYMeasurementAnnotation.setOrientation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation)
      Sets the orientation to use when drawing this annotation.
      Constructors in org.jfree.chart.annotations with parameters of type XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation 
      Constructor and Description
      XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation, String text, double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
      Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates.
      XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation, String text, Point2D p1, Point2D p2)
      Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected XYAnnotation XYMeasureWithAnnotations.createMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation, String label, Point2DNumber first, Point2DNumber second)
      Creates an annotation for a measurement.
